text_block_list.text:
The Classic Triple Crown commences today with
its inaugurating race, the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Something like that. Ever since the Asahi Hai
Futurity Stakes, I've gotten into the habit of
touching the tape.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I do it unconsciously whenever I'm trying to focus.
It's a weird habit. But it's not even that...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'm bored.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Only other classic runners are competing. Being
so limited is a bit underwhelming.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
It's a once-in-a-lifetime race, so there's something
exciting about that, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
It just seems like a shame that I only get to do it
against racers in the same year.
Knock, knock.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Who is it?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: ...It's me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Amazon? What's up? You're not running today,
are you?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Just droppin' in to check up on ya. Or rather, to
bring tidings from the battlefront.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I won the Oka Sho—the first tiara is mine.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: So you're coming to brag?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
No, idiot! I wouldn't come all the way here just for
that.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
...You're about to enter a once-in-a-lifetime race.
Not just for you, but for all of your competition
as well.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: There's no room for making mistakes out there.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Haha, I see... That makes sense.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
It seems that a once-in-a-lifetime race is an
irreplaceable experience for a racer.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Just by looking at Amazon, I can see that it must
have been a tough first race.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Let's put aside any unnecessary concerns about
who my opponents are for now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Instead... I wonder what kind of battle is in store
for me.
